D

Deck - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.decks
The Deck abstract class represent the idea of a generic list of cards.
Deck() - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.decks.Deck
The constructor of the abstract class Deck creates the list that will contain the cards.
DeckCardDrawnMessage - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.turns
This message is sent to the client when a card is drawn from the deck.
DeckCardDrawnMessage(MessageId, String, Resource, int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.turns.DeckCardDrawnMessage
Constructor.
decodeAndExecute(GameController, ClientHandler) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.initialization.ChooseObjectiveMessage
Method called by the server to decode and execute the message of choosing an objective card.
decodeAndExecute(GameController, ClientHandler) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.initialization.ChooseTokenMessage
This method is called by the server to execute the action that the message carries.
decodeAndExecute(GameController, ClientHandler) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.lobby.CreationMessage
This method is called by the client to execute the action that the message carries.
decodeAndExecute(GameController, ClientHandler) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.lobby.JoinMessage
This method will add the player to the lobby and send the updated lobby view to all the players in the lobby.
decodeAndExecute(GameController, ClientHandler) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.lobby.LobbyRequestMessage
This method will send the list of lobbies to the client.
decodeAndExecute(GameController, ClientHandler) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.MessageToServer
Decodes the message and executes the action that it represents
decodeAndExecute(GameController, ClientHandler) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.mixed.PlaceMessage
This method will place the card in the player's kingdom and send the updated kingdom view to all the players in the game.
decodeAndExecute(GameController, ClientHandler) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.PingToServer
Decodes the message and executes the action that it represents
decodeAndExecute(GameController, ClientHandler) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.turns.DrawAvailableMessage
This method will check if the player is allowed to draw the card and if the card is available.
decodeAndExecute(GameController, ClientHandler) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.turns.DrawDeckMessage
Method that decodes the message and executes the action.
decodeAndExecute(View) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.endgame.ResultsMessage
This method is called by the client to decode the message and execute the action.
decodeAndExecute(View) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.initialization.InitMessage
This method is called by the client to execute the action that the message carries.
decodeAndExecute(View) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.initialization.NowUnavailableMessage
This method sets the token to the player that has it and removes the token from the game.
decodeAndExecute(View) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.initialization.TurnsMessage
This method is called by the client to execute the action that the message carries.
decodeAndExecute(View) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.lobby.LobbiesListMessage
This method will set the list of lobbies in the view and change the view state to CHOOSE_LOBBY.
decodeAndExecute(View) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.lobby.PlayerJoinedMessage
This method will add the player to the lobby and send the updated lobby view to all the players in the lobby.
decodeAndExecute(View) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.lobby.UpdateLobbyMessage
This method will add the player to the lobby and send the updated lobby view to all the players in the lobby.
decodeAndExecute(View) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.MessageToClient
Decodes the message and executes the action that it represents
decodeAndExecute(View) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.mixed.ErrorMessage
This method will print the error message and change the view state to ERROR.
decodeAndExecute(View) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.mixed.NotifyMessage
This method will receive the message and change the view state accordingly.
decodeAndExecute(View) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.mixed.PlayerDisconnectedMessage
This method will change the view state to DISCONNECTION.
decodeAndExecute(View) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.mixed.UpdateKingdomMessage
This method is used to decode the message and execute the action on the view.
decodeAndExecute(View) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.PingToClient
Decodes the message and executes the action that it represents
decodeAndExecute(View) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.turns.DeckCardDrawnMessage
This method adds the drawn card to the player's hand and updates the top of the deck.
decodeAndExecute(View) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.turns.UpdateAvailableView
This method updates the available cards in the view.
decodeAndExecute(View) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.turns.UpdateDeckView
This method updates the deck in the view.
DiagonalDown - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective
The DiagonalDown class represents the objective cards that require a descending diagonal (from left to right) of cards of the same colour in order to be fulfilled.
DiagonalDown(int, int, Resource, Resource) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective.DiagonalDown
The DiagonalDown(id, points, otherResource, cardColourThatTriggersCheck) constructor uses the constructor of the superclass to assign the id, the points, the otherResource and the cardColourThatTriggersCheck attributes to the ones given as parameters.
DiagonalUp - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective
The DiagonalUp class represents the objective cards that require an ascending diagonal (from left to right) of cards of the same colour in order to be fulfilled.
DiagonalUp(int, int, Resource, Resource) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective.DiagonalUp
The DiagonalUp(id, points, otherResource, cardColourThatTriggersCheck) constructor uses the constructor of the superclass to assign the id, the points, the otherResource and the cardColourThatTriggersCheck attributes to the ones given as parameters.
Direction - Enum Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective
The Direction enumeration is used to indicate where the Corner of the Card is located.
disconnectAndCloseGame() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server.ClientHandler
This method is used to close the connection with the client.
DISCONNECTION - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.ViewState
The view is in this state when the player disconnects.
DRAW - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.ViewState
The view is in the state of waiting for the player to draw a card.
DRAW_AVAIL - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.MessageId
DRAW FROM AVAILABLE message type
DRAW_DECK - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.MessageId
DRAW FROM DECK message type
DrawAvailableMessage - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.turns
This message is sent by the client to the server when the player wants to draw a card from the available cards.
DrawAvailableMessage(MessageId, String, int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.turns.DrawAvailableMessage
Constructor of the message.
drawCard() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.decks.Deck
The drawCard() method checks if the deck is empty and if it is throws an exception.
drawCard() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.decks.GoldDeck
the drawCard method gives to the player the first gold card of the deck and proceed to remove it from the deck.
drawCard() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.decks.ObjectiveDeck
the drawCard method gives to the player the first objective card of the deck and proceed to remove it from the deck.
drawCard() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.decks.ResourceDeck
the drawCard method gives to the player the first resource card of the deck and proceed to remove it from the deck.
drawCard() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.decks.StartDeck
the drawCard method gives to the player the first starting card of the deck and proceed to remove it from the deck.
drawCardFromAvailable(int, String, int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server.RMIServer
This method is used to make the player draw a card from the available cards.
drawCardFromAvailable(int, String, int) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server.RMIServerStub
This method is used to make a player draw a card from the available cards.
drawCardFromAvailable(StandardCard) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.player.Player
The drawCardFromAvailable(card) method adds the available Card chosen by the player to his hand.
drawCardFromAvailable(String, int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver.RMIVirtualServer
This method is used to make the player draw a card from the available cards.
drawCardFromAvailable(String, int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver.TCPVirtualServer
This method sends a message to the server to draw a card from the available cards.
drawCardFromAvailable(String, int) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver.VirtualServer
This method is used to make the player draw a card from the available cards.
drawCardFromDeck(int, String, String) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server.RMIServer
This method is used to make the player draw a card from the deck.
drawCardFromDeck(int, String, String) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server.RMIServerStub
This method is used to make a player draw a card from the deck.
drawCardFromDeck(GoldDeck) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.player.Player
The drawCardFromDeck(deck) method adds a Gold Card to the hand of the player by drawing it from the deck given as a parameter.
drawCardFromDeck(ResourceDeck) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.player.Player
The drawCardFromDeck(deck) method adds a Resource Card to the hand of the player by drawing it from the deck given as a parameter.
drawCardFromDeck(String, String) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver.RMIVirtualServer
This method is used to make the player draw a card from the deck.
drawCardFromDeck(String, String) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver.TCPVirtualServer
This method sends a message to the server to draw a card from the deck.
drawCardFromDeck(String, String) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver.VirtualServer
This method is used to make the player draw a card from the deck.
DrawDeckMessage - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.turns
Message used to draw a card from the deck.
DrawDeckMessage(MessageId, String, String) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.turns.DrawDeckMessage
Constructor of the message.
drawFromAvail(int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.GUIView
This method is used to draw from the available cards.
drawFromDeck(String) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.GUIView
This method is used to draw from a deck.
